title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Infosys Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Infosys Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys Advisory Limited:
Infosys Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
